who: compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 compliance documents/month
offer: For compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 compliance documents/month, manual generation causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate document generation instead of manual document creation and email distribution.
problem: Manual generation and distribution of compliance documents is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for compliance officers
Indie Hackers posts about document workflows
DM outreach to compliance officers with demo video
Community forums for sharing compliance tools
try_it: Let users try template-based document generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Fewer steps in the onboarding process
